top_signals.title: Trump administration urges banks to scrutinize lending to immigrants without work authorization
top_signals.summary: Federal bank regulators issued guidance Monday seeking to curb mortgages, auto loans and other consumer credit to immigrants without U.S. work authorization.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Commission approves €659 million German State aid for four new semiconductor facilities
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 14 Jul 2026 The European Commission has approved €659 million in German State aid to support the establishment of four first-of-a-kind facilities in the semiconductor value chain.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Bloomberg Retracts Singapore Property Story After Court Order
top_signals.summary: Bloomberg News retracted a story about property transactions in Singapore originally published on Dec. 12, 2024 to comply with an order from the country’s High Court.

top_signals.title: 3 things you need to know about cyclospora
top_signals.summary: Cyclospora, a parasitic infection that can cause weeks of severe diarrhea, is spreading in the U.S. Here's what to know about the disease, and how to stay safe.

top_signals.title: Review finds Foreign Subsidies Regulation fit for purpose, Commission considers targeted changes
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 14 Jul 2026 The European Commission's first review of the Foreign Subsidies Regulation (FSR) has found that the regulation is fit for purpose to address distortions in the internal market caused by foreign subsidies. Its objective of maintaining a level playing field in the internal market is widely acknowledged and remains relevant.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Questions and answers on the findings of the first review of the Foreign Subsidies Regulation
top_signals.summary: European Commission Questions and answers Brussels, 14 Jul 2026 Under Article 52(2) of the Foreign Subsidies Regulation (FSR), the European Commission is obliged to review its practice of implementing and enforcing the rules...
